verses.text: The lamps are lit to give light before the candlestick. The lamps. Light shines in God's house.
The lamps are lit to give light before the candlestick. The lamps. Light shines in God's house.

The Levites are cleansed with the water of purifying. Cleansed. They are made fit to serve.
The Levites are cleansed with the water of purifying. Cleansed. They are made fit to serve.
The Levites are cleansed with the water of purifying. Cleansed. They are made fit to serve.
They are offered as a wave offering for Israel. Waved. They are wholly given to God.
They are offered as a wave offering for Israel. Waved. They are wholly given to God.
They are offered as a wave offering for Israel. Waved. They are wholly given to God.
They are offered as a wave offering for Israel. Waved. They are wholly given to God.
The Levites are set apart instead of the firstborn. Instead. They stand for Israel's firstborn.
The Levites are set apart instead of the firstborn. Instead. They stand for Israel's firstborn.
The Levites are set apart instead of the firstborn. Instead. They stand for Israel's firstborn.
They are given to do the service and make atonement. Given. They serve in the people's stead.
They are given to do the service and make atonement. Given. They serve in the people's stead.

Moses, Aaron, and Israel do as commanded. Obeyed. The Levites are set to their work.
Moses, Aaron, and Israel do as commanded. Obeyed. The Levites are set to their work.
Moses, Aaron, and Israel do as commanded. Obeyed. The Levites are set to their work.
The Levites serve from twenty-five to fifty, then rest. Their term. God orders their years of service.
